Label: Full Name
Definition: A Proper Name that designates a Person using their complete name.

Label: Given Name
Definition: A Proper Name component designating the given (first) name of a Person.

Label: Additional Name
Definition: A Proper Name component designating a middle or additional name of a Person.

Label: Family Name
Definition: A Proper Name component designating the family (last) name of a Person.

Label: Suffix
Definition: A Proper Name component designating an honorific suffix of a Person (e.g., Jr., PhD).

Label: Alternate Name
Definition: A Designative Name that designates a Person by an alias, pseudonym, or stage name.

Label: National Person Identifier
Definition: A Code Identifier assigned by a national authority to uniquely identify a Person.

Label: Social Security Number
Definition: A National Person Identifier assigned by the US Social Security Administration.

Label: Postal Address
Definition: A Designative Information Content Entity that designates a location for postal delivery.

Label: US Postal Address
Definition: A Postal Address conforming to United States Postal Service format.

Label: Street Address
Definition: A component of a Postal Address designating the street-level location.

Label: City Name
Definition: A Proper Name that designates a city within a Postal Address.

Label: State Name
Definition: A Proper Name that designates a state or province within a Postal Address.

Label: Country Name
Definition: A Proper Name that designates a country within a Postal Address.

Label: Postal Code
Definition: A Code Identifier designating a postal delivery zone.

Label: Address Designation
Definition: A Process in which a Person is associated with a Postal Address during a temporal interval.
Notes: Temporal address tracking; BFO Process subclass

Label: has start date
Definition: Relates an Address Designation to the date on which it began.

Label: has end date
Definition: Relates an Address Designation to the date on which it ended; absent if current address.

Label: Birthdate
Definition: A Calendar Date Identifier that designates the date on which a Person was born.
Notes: RFC 9553 §2.8.1; corrects Claude Code's wrong parent (Quality)

Label: Postal Zone
Definition: A Local Administrative Region delimiting delivery points within a postal system.
Notes: Geographic region designated by a PostalCode; migrated from Orphan

Label: Title
Definition: A Designative Name component preceding the given name (Mr., Dr., Prof.).
Notes: RFC 9553 §2.2.1; distinct from Suffix which follows family name

Label: Surname2
Definition: A secondary surname used in naming conventions where a person bears two family names.
Notes: RFC 9553 §2.2.1; maternal surname in Spanish/Portuguese naming

Label: Country Code
Definition: A Code Identifier designating a country using ISO 3166-1 standardized abbreviation.
Notes: RFC 9553 §2.5.1; distinct from CountryName (ent00000014) which is a Proper Name

Label: US
Definition: ISO 3166-1 code designating the United States of America. altLabels: USA, 840.
Notes: First Named Individual in registry — demonstrates ent scheme covers instances too

Label: Has Birthday
Definition: Each instance of Person has an instance of Birthdate
